claim_title: Root-level clutter includes tracked and stray artifacts

results.description: Verify root clutter items were removed or relocated from repository root.
results.command: tracked=$(git ls-files RCLONE_TEST | wc -l); exist_count=0; for item in 2025_popest_data journal_article_pdfs chatgpt_feedback_on_v0.9.md formula_audit_article-0.9-production_20260112_205726.md ward_county_nd_population_2008_2024.xlsx ingest.log ingest_full.log ingest_nohup.log; do [ -e "$item" ] && exist_count=$((exist_count+1)); done; echo "RCLONE_TEST_TRACKED=$tracked"; echo "ROOT_CLUTTER_EXISTS=$exist_count"; if [ "$tracked" -eq 0 ] && [ "$exist_count" -eq 0 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
